changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: The former 價位-triggered wrapper added unsupported fragment status to ordinary nominal/scalar material; removing it preserves visible nominal structure without inventing discourse or copular relations.

implementation_validation: At v0.5.209, regression remains 551/551, NP remains 43/43, and 1,234 construction assertions across 164 active labels pass. 中等價位 retains ModifierNP, 價位 retains NominalHeadSpan, and 呢個價位 retains OvertHeadDemonstrativeClassifierNP without ScalarRangeFragment.
linguistic_confidence: Retirement removes an unsupported fragment analysis. It does not establish a productive price-range construction, omitted copula, or discourse-fragment rule.
